---
title: "Zichen Zhang"
---

## Welcome

This is my personal website built with **Quarto** and hosted on **GitHub Pages**.

---

## Python Demo

Below is a simple Python example running inside Quarto.

```{python}
import pandas as pd

data = {
    "Course": ["AD599", "AD571", "AD632"],
    "Topic": ["Python & SQL", "Real Estate Analytics", "Finance"],
    "Difficulty": [4, 4, 5]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)
df
